name: Rectangular Hamper with Lid - Brightroom™
description:
Keep your clothes or sheets organized neatly and out of the way until laundry day with this Rectangular Hamper with Lid from Brightroom™. Made from plastic, this multipurpose white hamper has a 50-liter capacity, ventilation holes on the lid and sides for airflow, and two side handles for convenient carrying.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
